hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext: Crystal Command project ritual: at the START of this session — on your FIRST reply, before addressing the user's request — render the ship-checklist widget if the widget tool is available. Steps: (1) silently call mcp__visualize__read_me with modules ['interactive']; (2) Read .claude/ship-widget.html and pass its full contents as widget_code to mcp__visualize__show_widget with title 'crystal_command_ship_checklist', favicon-free, and playful loading_messages; (3) then proceed with whatever the user asked, referencing checklist items where relevant. If mcp__visualize__show_widget is NOT available in this session (e.g. plain CLI), skip the widget silently and instead give a 2-line status from SHIP-CHECKLIST.md (next Apple-track item + days until July 31). Keep the widget file and SHIP-CHECKLIST.md in sync whenever tasks are completed or added.
